    49→            pages=max_pages,

    51→            browser=browser

    61→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")

   248→@click.option('--keywords', '-k', multiple=True, help='Search keywords (can specify multiple)')
   249→@click.option('--template', '-t', help='Message template name')
   250→@click.option('--var', '-v', multiple=True, help='Template variable (format: key=value)')

   252→@click.option('--location', '-l', help='Filter by location')

   254→@click.option('--dry-run', is_flag=True, help='Search only, do not send messages')
   255→@click.option('--skip-messaged/--no-skip-messaged', default=True, help='Skip already messaged candidates')
   256→@click.option('--batch-pages', '-b', type=int, default=0, help='Send messages every N pages (0 = send after all pages)')
   257→@click.option('--interactive', '-i', is_flag=True, help='Enable interactive selector discovery when auto-detection fails')

   259→def pipeline(keywords, template, var, company, location, max_pages, dry_run, skip_messaged, batch_pages, interactive, resume):
   260→    """
   261→    Search candidates and batch send messages in one command.
   262→
   263→    Combines multi-keyword search with batch messaging:
   264→    search → preview → confirm → send.
   265→
   266→    Use --batch-pages to interleave search and messaging every N pages.
   267→    Example: -p 10 --batch-pages 2 searches pages 1-2, sends messages,
   268→    then pages 3-4, sends messages, etc.
   269→
   270→    Use --resume to continue from the last interrupted pipeline run.
   271→
   272→    Examples:\n
   273→        maimai pipeline -k "前端工程师" -t greeting -v "recruiter_name=张三" -p 2\n
   274→        maimai pipeline -k "前端" -k "后端" -t greeting -v "recruiter_name=张三" --dry-run\n
   275→        maimai pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting -p 10 --batch-pages 2\n
   276→        maimai pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting -p 1 -i\n
   277→        maimai pipeline --resume
   278→    """
   279→    from src.modules.message import send_message_batch
   280→    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   281→    from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   282→
   283→    # Handle resume mode
   284→    if resume:
   285→        ckpt = CheckpointManager.load_latest()
   286→        if ckpt is None:
   287→            console.print("[red]No checkpoint found to resume from.[/red]")
   288→            return
   289→
   290→        from rich.panel import Panel
   291→        console.print(Panel(ckpt.summary, title="Resuming Pipeline", border_style="cyan"))
   292→
   293→        p = ckpt.params
   294→        keywords = tuple(p.get('keywords', []))
   295→        template = p.get('template', template)
   296→        variables = p.get('variables', {})
   297→        company = tuple(p.get('company', []))
   298→        location = p.get('location', location)
   299→        max_pages = p.get('max_pages', max_pages)
   300→        batch_pages = p.get('batch_pages', batch_pages)
   301→        skip_messaged = p.get('skip_messaged', skip_messaged)
   302→        interactive = p.get('interactive', interactive)
   303→    else:
   304→        ckpt = None
   305→        # Parse variables
   306→        variables = {}
   307→        for v in var:
   308→            if '=' in v:
   309→                key, value = v.split('=', 1)
   310→                variables[key.strip()] = value.strip()
   311→
   312→    if not keywords or not template:
   313→        console.print("[red]--keywords (-k) and --template (-t) are required (or use --resume).[/red]")
   314→        return
   315→
   316→    async def _pipeline():
   317→        from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
   318→
   319→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   320→        try:
   321→            # Ensure logged in BEFORE any search/message operations
   322→            await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   323→
   324→            if batch_pages > 0:
   325→                await _pipeline_batched(browser, keywords, company, location,
   326→                                        max_pages, batch_pages, template, variables,
   327→                                        dry_run, skip_messaged, ckpt)
   328→            else:
   329→                await _pipeline_default(browser, keywords, company, location,
   330→                                        max_pages, template, variables,
   331→                                        dry_run, skip_messaged)
   332→        finally:
   333→            await browser.close()
   334→
   335→    async def _pipeline_default(browser, keywords, company, location,
   336→                                max_pages, template, variables, dry_run, skip_messaged):
   337→        """Original pipeline: search all pages, then send messages."""
   338→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await _search_all_keywords(
   339→            browser, keywords, company, location, max_pages
   340→        )
   341→
   342→        if not all_candidates:
   343→            console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   344→            return
   345→
   346→        _display_candidates_table(all_candidates, "Pipeline Results")
   347→
   348→        if dry_run:
   349→            console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] {len(all_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   350→            return
   351→
   352→        results = await _send_batch(all_candidates, template, variables, browser, skip_messaged, interactive)
   353→        _display_send_results(results)

   355→    async def _pipeline_batched(browser, keywords, company, location,
   356→                                max_pages, batch_pages, template, variables,
   357→                                dry_run, skip_messaged, resume_ckpt=None):
   358→        """Batched pipeline: search N pages, send messages, repeat."""
   359→        from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in, check_login_status
   360→        from src.core.session import get_session_manager
   361→        from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   362→
   363→        # Restore state from checkpoint or start fresh
   364→        if resume_ckpt:
   365→            seen_ids = resume_ckpt.seen_ids
   366→            sent_ids = list(resume_ckpt.sent_ids)
   367→            total_results = resume_ckpt.total_results or {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0}
   368→            start_from_page = resume_ckpt.completed_pages + 1
   369→            console.print(f"[cyan]Resuming from page {start_from_page}[/cyan]")
   370→            checkpoint = resume_ckpt
   371→        else:
   372→            seen_ids = set()
   373→            sent_ids = []
   374→            total_results = {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0}
   375→            start_from_page = 1
   376→            checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   377→
   378→        batch_num = 0
   379→        consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   380→
   381→        for batch_start in range(start_from_page, max_pages + 1, batch_pages):
   382→            batch_page_count = min(batch_pages, max_pages - batch_start + 1)
   383→            batch_num += 1
   384→            batch_end = batch_start + batch_page_count - 1
   385→
   386→            console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Batch {batch_num}: Pages {batch_start}-{batch_end} ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   387→
   388→            batch_candidates, batch_seen = await _search_all_keywords(
   389→                browser, keywords, company, location, batch_page_count, start_page=batch_start
   390→            )
   391→            # Filter out globally seen IDs
   392→            batch_candidates = [c for c in batch_candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
   393→            seen_ids.update(c.maimai_id for c in batch_candidates)
   394→
   395→            if not batch_candidates:
   396→                consecutive_empty_batches += 1
   397→                console.print(f"[yellow]No new candidates in batch {batch_num}.[/yellow]")
   398→
   399→                # If multiple consecutive batches return 0, session likely expired
   400→                if consecutive_empty_batches >= 2:
   401→                    console.print("[red]Multiple consecutive empty batches detected. Verifying login status...[/red]")
   402→                    if not await check_login_status(browser.page):
   403→                        console.print("[red]Session expired! Clearing session and re-authenticating...[/red]")
   404→                        session_manager = get_session_manager()
   405→                        await session_manager.clear()
   406→                        await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   407→                        consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   408→                        console.print("[green]Re-authenticated. Retrying current batch...[/green]")
   409→                    else:
   410→                        console.print("[yellow]Session appears valid. Possibly no more results for these keywords.[/yellow]")
   411→
   412→                # Save checkpoint even for empty batches
   413→                checkpoint.save(
   414→                    keywords=keywords, template=template, variables=variables,
   415→                    company=company, location=location, max_pages=max_pages,
   416→                    batch_pages=batch_pages, skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   417→                    interactive=interactive, completed_pages=batch_end,
   418→                    sent_ids=sent_ids, seen_ids=list(seen_ids),
   419→                    total_results=total_results,
   420→                )
   421→                continue
   422→            else:
   423→                consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   424→
   425→            _display_candidates_table(batch_candidates, f"Batch {batch_num} Results")
   426→
   427→            if dry_run:
   428→                console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] Batch {batch_num}: {len(batch_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   429→                # Save checkpoint
   430→                checkpoint.save(
   431→                    keywords=keywords, template=template, variables=variables,
   432→                    company=company, location=location, max_pages=max_pages,
   433→                    batch_pages=batch_pages, skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   434→                    interactive=interactive, completed_pages=batch_end,
   435→                    sent_ids=sent_ids, seen_ids=list(seen_ids),
   436→                    total_results=total_results,
   437→                )
   438→                continue
   439→
   440→            results = await _send_batch(batch_candidates, template, variables, browser, skip_messaged, interactive)
   441→            _display_send_results(results, title=f"Batch {batch_num} Send Results")
   442→
   443→            # Track sent IDs from this batch
   444→            for detail in results.get('details', []):
   445→                if detail.get('status') == 'sent':
   446→                    sent_ids.append(detail['maimai_id'])
   447→
   448→            # Accumulate totals
   449→            for key in total_results:
   450→                total_results[key] += results[key]
   451→
   452→            # Save checkpoint after each batch
   453→            checkpoint.save(
   454→                keywords=keywords, template=template, variables=variables,
   455→                company=company, location=location, max_pages=max_pages,
   456→                batch_pages=batch_pages, skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   457→                interactive=interactive, completed_pages=batch_end,
   458→                sent_ids=sent_ids, seen_ids=list(seen_ids),
   459→                total_results=total_results,
   460→            )
   461→            console.print(f"[dim]Checkpoint saved (page {batch_end})[/dim]")
   462→
   463→        # Final summary
   464→        console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Pipeline Complete ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   465→        console.print(f"Total unique candidates found: {len(seen_ids)}")
   466→        if not dry_run and total_results['total'] > 0:
   467→            _display_send_results(total_results, title="Overall Send Results")
   468→
   469→        # Clean up checkpoint on successful completion
   470→        checkpoint.delete()
   471→        console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")

   473→    def _display_candidates_table(candidates, title):
   474→        """Display a table of candidates."""
   475→        table = Table(title=f"{title} ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   476→        table.add_column("#", style="dim", justify="right")
   477→        table.add_column("Name", style="cyan")
   478→        table.add_column("Title", style="green")
   479→        table.add_column("Company", style="yellow")
   480→        table.add_column("Location", style="blue")
   481→        has_scores = any(hasattr(c, '_score') for c in candidates[:1])
   482→        if has_scores:
   483→            table.add_column("Score", style="magenta", justify="right")
   484→        table.add_column("ID", style="dim")
   485→
   486→        for i, c in enumerate(candidates[:50], 1):
   487→            row = [str(i), c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or '']
   488→            if has_scores:
   489→                row.append(str(getattr(c, '_score', '')))
   490→            row.append(c.maimai_id)
   491→            table.add_row(*row)
   492→
   493→        console.print(table)
   494→
   495→        if len(candidates) > 50:

   498→    async def _send_batch(candidates, template, variables, browser, skip_messaged, interactive=False):
   499→        """Send messages to a batch of candidates, sorted by score."""
   500→        from src.utils.scoring import sort_candidates_by_score
   501→
   502→        # Sort candidates by score (best first)
   503→        sorted_candidates = sort_candidates_by_score(candidates, search_keywords=list(keywords))
   504→
   505→        candidate_dicts = [
   506→            {
   507→                'maimai_id': c.maimai_id,
   508→                'name': c.name,
   509→                'company': c.company,
   510→                'title': c.title,
   511→                'profile_url': c.profile_url,
   512→            }
   513→            for c in sorted_candidates
   514→        ]
   515→
   516→        return await send_message_batch(
   517→            candidates=candidate_dicts,
   518→            template_name=template,
   519→            common_variables=variables,
   520→            browser=browser,
   521→            skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   522→            interactive=interactive,
   523→        )
   524→
   525→    def _display_send_results(results, title="Send Results"):
   526→        """Display send results summary table."""
   527→        console.print()
   528→        result_table = Table(title=title)
   529→        result_table.add_column("Metric", style="bold")
   530→        result_table.add_column("Count", justify="right")
   531→

    42→def _extract_user_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    43→    """Extract dstu/user_id from a Maimai profile URL for direct chat navigation.
    44→
    45→    Only returns IDs that are known to work with the chat URL (u2= parameter).
    46→    Query-param IDs (dstu, u2, egid) are reliable for chat navigation.
    47→    Path-based IDs (/contact/detail/xxx) are NOT the same as chat user IDs
    48→    and should not be used for direct chat URL construction.
    49→    """
    50→    from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
    51→    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    52→    params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
    53→    # Only use query parameter IDs — these are confirmed to work with uh_chat_pc
    54→    for key in ('dstu', 'u2', 'egid'):
    55→        if key in params:
    56→            return params[key][0]
    57→    return None
    58→
    59→
    60→def _extract_contact_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    61→    """Extract contact/profile ID from a Maimai profile URL path.
    62→
    63→    These IDs are for navigating to the profile page (not for direct chat).
    64→    """
    65→    import re
    66→    from urllib.parse import urlparse
    67→    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    68→    path_match = re.search(r'/(?:profile|contact)/detail/(\w+)', parsed.path)
    69→    if path_match:
    70→        return path_match.group(1)
    71→    return None

   314→async def send_message_batch(
   315→    candidates: List[dict],
   316→    template_name: str,
   317→    common_variables: Dict[str, str],
   318→    browser: BrowserManager,
   319→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   320→    interactive: bool = False,
   321→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   322→    """
   323→    Batch send messages to a list of candidates.
   324→
   325→    Flow:
   326→    1. Filter already-messaged candidates
   327→    2. Auto-fill name/company/position variables per candidate
   328→    3. Render message template
   329→    4. Show candidate list + first message preview
   330→    5. Single confirmation
   331→    6. Send one by one, checking rate limit each time
   332→    7. Skip failures and record
   333→    8. Return result stats
   334→
   335→    Args:
   336→        candidates: List of dicts with maimai_id, name, company, title
   337→        template_name: Name of message template
   338→        common_variables: Shared variables (recruiter_name, target_position, etc.)
   339→        browser: Browser manager instance
   340→        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged (default True)
   341→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery on first failure
   342→
   343→    Returns:
   344→        Dict with total, sent, failed, skipped, rate_limited, details
   345→    """
   346→    config = get_config()
   347→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   348→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   349→
   350→    # Get template
   351→    try:
   352→        template = config.get_template(template_name)
   353→    except Exception:
   354→        raise ValidationError(f"Template not found: {template_name}")
   355→
   356→    # Create shared discovered selectors for interactive mode
   357→    if interactive:
   358→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import DiscoveredSelectors
   359→        discovered_selectors = DiscoveredSelectors()
   360→    else:
   361→        discovered_selectors = None
   362→
   363→    results = {
   364→        'total': len(candidates),
   365→        'sent': 0,
   366→        'failed': 0,
   367→        'skipped': 0,
   368→        'rate_limited': 0,
   369→        'details': [],
   370→    }
   371→
   372→    # Filter already-messaged candidates
   373→    send_list = []
   374→    for c in candidates:
   375→        if skip_messaged:
   376→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   377→                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
   378→                    candidate_maimai_id=c['maimai_id'],
   379→                    status='sent'
   380→                ).first()
   381→                if existing_msg:
   382→                    results['skipped'] += 1
   383→                    results['details'].append({
   384→                        'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   385→                        'name': c['name'],
   386→                        'status': 'skipped',
   387→                        'reason': 'already messaged',
   388→                    })
   389→                    continue
   390→        send_list.append(c)
   391→
   392→    if not send_list:
   393→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to send messages to.[/yellow]")
   394→        return results
   395→
   396→    # Build preview for first candidate
   397→    first = send_list[0]
   398→    first_vars = {**common_variables, 'name': first['name'], 'company': first['company'], 'position': first['title']}
   399→    first_content = render_template(template['content'], first_vars)
   400→
   401→    # Display summary panel
   402→    from rich.table import Table
   403→
   404→    summary_text = Text()
   405→    summary_text.append("Template: ", style="bold")

   427→    # Single confirmation (run in executor to avoid nested event loop)

   439→
   440→    # Send messages one by one
   441→    from rich.progress import Progress, BarColumn, TextColumn as ProgressTextColumn, MofNCompleteColumn
   442→
   443→    with Progress(

   445→        BarColumn(),

   448→    ) as progress:
   449→        task = progress.add_task("Sending messages...", total=len(send_list))
   450→
   451→        for c in send_list:

   455→            except RateLimitExceededError as e:

   457→                remaining = len(send_list) - (results['sent'] + results['failed'])

   467→            # Build per-candidate variables

   474→            content = render_template(template['content'], variables)

   489→                if success:

   491→                    results['details'].append({
   492→                        'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   493→                        'name': c['name'],
   494→                        'status': 'sent',
   495→                    })
   496→                else:
   497→                    results['failed'] += 1
   498→                    results['details'].append({
   499→                        'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   500→                        'name': c['name'],
   501→                        'status': 'failed',
   502→                    })
   503→            except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   504→                remaining = len(send_list) - (results['sent'] + results['failed'])
   505→                results['rate_limited'] = remaining
   506→                results['details'].append({
   507→                    'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   508→                    'name': c['name'],
   509→                    'status': 'rate_limited',
   510→                    'reason': str(e),
   511→                })
   512→                console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
   513→                break
   514→            except Exception as e:

   522→                logger.error(f"Failed to send message to {c['name']}: {e}")
   523→
   524→            progress.advance(task)
   525→
   526→            # Human-like delay between messages
   527→            await async_random_delay('message')

   823→async def _verify_message_sent(page: Page, content: str, timeout: int = 5000) -> bool:
   824→    """
   825→    Verify that a message was actually sent by checking the conversation area.
   826→
   827→    Polls up to `timeout` ms with short intervals to handle async rendering.
   828→
   829→    Checks for:
   830→    1. The sent message content appearing in the conversation
   831→    2. The message input being cleared (indicating successful send)
   832→    3. A sent/delivered indicator element
   833→
   834→    Args:
   835→        page: Playwright page instance
   836→        content: The message content that was sent
   837→        timeout: Max time to wait for verification in ms
   838→
   839→    Returns:
   840→        True if message send was verified
   841→    """
   842→    import asyncio
   843→    import time
   844→
   845→    # Short snippet for matching (first 20 chars, avoid template artifacts)
   846→    snippet = content[:20].strip()
   847→
   848→    poll_interval_ms = 500
   849→    deadline = time.monotonic() + timeout / 1000.0
   850→
   851→    while True:
   852→        try:
   853→            # Strategy 1: Check if message content appears in conversation area
   854→            verified = await page.evaluate('''(snippet) => {
   855→                const chatSelectors = [
   856→                    '[class*="message-list"]',
   857→                    '[class*="chat-content"]',
   858→                    '[class*="conversation"]',
   859→                    '[class*="msg-list"]',
   860→                    '[class*="im-message"]',
   861→                    '[class*="chat-msg"]',
   862→                ];
   863→
   864→                for (const sel of chatSelectors) {
   865→                    const container = document.querySelector(sel);
   866→                    if (container && container.textContent.includes(snippet)) {
   867→                        return true;
   868→                    }
   869→                }
   870→
   871→                // Fallback: scan leaf-ish elements in the lower portion of the page
   872→                const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;
   873→                const elements = document.querySelectorAll('div, p, span');
   874→                for (const el of elements) {
   875→                    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
   876→                    if (rect.top > viewportHeight * 0.3 && el.textContent.includes(snippet)) {
   877→                        if (el.textContent.length < snippet.length + 200) {
   878→                            return true;
   879→                        }
   880→                    }
   881→                }
   882→
   883→                return false;
   884→            }''', snippet)
   885→
   886→            if verified:
   887→                logger.debug("Message send verified: content found in conversation")
   888→                return True
   889→
   890→            # Strategy 2: Check if input was cleared (indicates successful send)
   891→            input_cleared = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   892→                const inputs = document.querySelectorAll(
   893→                    'textarea, [contenteditable="true"], input[type="text"]'
   894→                );
   895→                for (const input of inputs) {
   896→                    const rect = input.getBoundingClientRect();
   897→                    if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) {
   898→                        const value = input.value || input.textContent || '';
   899→                        if (value.trim() === '') {
   900→                            return true;
   901→                        }
   902→                    }
   903→                }
   904→                return false;
   905→            }''')
   906→
   907→            if input_cleared:
   908→                logger.debug("Message send verified: input field was cleared")
   909→                return True
   910→
   911→            # Strategy 3: Check for sent/delivered indicators
   912→            sent_indicators = [
   913→                '[class*="sent"]',
   914→                '[class*="delivered"]',
   915→                '[class*="success"]',
   916→                '[class*="msg-status"]',
   917→            ]
   918→            for selector in sent_indicators:
   919→                try:
   920→                    indicator = await page.query_selector(selector)
   921→                    if indicator and await indicator.is_visible():
   922→                        logger.debug(f"Message send verified: indicator found ({selector})")
   923→                        return True
   924→                except Exception:
   925→                    continue
   926→
   927→        except Exception as e:
   928→            logger.warning(f"Message verification poll failed: {e}")
   929→
   930→        # Check if we've exceeded the deadline
   931→        if time.monotonic() >= deadline:
   932→            break
   933→
   934→        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_ms / 1000.0)
   935→
   936→    logger.warning("Could not verify message was sent after polling")
   937→    return False

   940→async def _check_existing_conversation(page: Page, maimai_id: str) -> bool:
   941→    """
   942→    Check if there's already an existing conversation with this candidate.
   943→
   944→    Checks for actual user message bubbles (not system prompts/tips) in the
   945→    conversation area.
   946→
   947→    Args:
   948→        page: Playwright page instance
   949→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
   950→
   951→    Returns:
   952→        True if an existing conversation was detected
   953→    """
   954→    try:
   955→        has_conversation = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   956→            // Look for conversation message containers
   957→            const chatSelectors = [
   958→                '[class*="message-list"]',
   959→                '[class*="chat-content"]',
   960→                '[class*="conversation"]',
   961→                '[class*="msg-list"]',
   962→                '[class*="im-message"]',
   963→                '[class*="chat-msg"]',
   964→                '[class*="chat-record"]',
   965→            ];
   966→
   967→            // System/tip patterns that should NOT count as existing conversation
   968→            const systemPatterns = [
   969→                '还不是好友', '添加好友', '发送好友申请', '对方未回复',
   970→                '以上是打招呼内容', '暂无消息', '开始聊天', '你们已经是好友',
   971→                '系统消息', '温馨提示', '安全提示', '注意事项',
   972→            ];
   973→
   974→            const isSystemText = (text) => {
   975→                const t = text.trim();
   976→                if (t.length < 5) return true;  // Too short to be a real message
   977→                return systemPatterns.some(p => t.includes(p));
   978→            };
   979→
   980→            for (const sel of chatSelectors) {
   981→                const container = document.querySelector(sel);
   982→                if (!container) continue;
   983→
   984→                // Strategy 1: Look for message bubble elements
   985→                const bubbleSelectors = [
   986→                    '[class*="msg-item"]', '[class*="message-item"]',
   987→                    '[class*="bubble"]', '[class*="chat-item"]',
   988→                    '[class*="msg-bubble"]', '[class*="chat-bubble"]',
   989→                ];
   990→                for (const bSel of bubbleSelectors) {
   991→                    const bubbles = container.querySelectorAll(bSel);
   992→                    // Filter out system/tip bubbles
   993→                    let realMessageCount = 0;
   994→                    for (const bubble of bubbles) {
   995→                        const text = bubble.textContent.trim();
   996→                        if (text.length > 5 && !isSystemText(text)) {
   997→                            realMessageCount++;
   998→                        }
   999→                    }
  1000→                    if (realMessageCount > 0) {
  1001→                        return true;
  1002→                    }
  1003→                }
  1004→
  1005→                // Strategy 2: If no bubble selectors matched, check direct children
  1006→                // that look like message blocks (not system tips)
  1007→                const children = container.children;
  1008→                let realChildCount = 0;
  1009→                for (const child of children) {
  1010→                    const text = child.textContent.trim();
  1011→                    // Must have meaningful content and not be a system message
  1012→                    if (text.length > 10 && !isSystemText(text)) {
  1013→                        // Check it's not a timestamp-only or status-only element
  1014→                        if (child.querySelector('img[class*="avatar"]') || text.length > 20) {
  1015→                            realChildCount++;
  1016→                        }
  1017→                    }
  1018→                }
  1019→                if (realChildCount > 0) {
  1020→                    return true;
  1021→                }
  1022→            }
  1023→            return false;
  1024→        }''')
  1025→
  1026→        if has_conversation:
  1027→            logger.info(f"Existing conversation detected for {maimai_id}")
  1028→        return has_conversation

    46→    for selector in captcha_selectors:

    50→                # Report captcha to adaptive rate limiter
    51→                rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()

    54→                console.print("[bold red]Captcha detected! Please solve it in the browser window.[/bold red]")

   124→
   125→    Args:
   126→        keywords: Search keywords (e.g., "高级前端工程师")
   127→        company: Filter by company names, tuple of strings (optional)
   128→        location: Filter by location (optional)

   140→    # Validate inputs

   142→
   143→    if browser is None:
   144→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   145→

   154→
   155→    with Progress(

   157→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   158→        console=console
   159→    ) as progress:
   160→
   161→        end_page = start_page + pages
   162→        for page_num in range(start_page, end_page):
   163→            task = progress.add_task(f"Searching page {page_num}/{end_page - 1}...", total=None)
   164→
   165→            try:
   166→                # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   167→                await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   168→
   169→                # Build search URL
   170→                params = {
   171→                    'type': 'contact',
   172→                    'query': keywords,
   173→                    'highlight': 'true'

   177→
   178→                search_url = f"{MAIMAI_SEARCH_URL}?{urlencode(params)}"
   179→
   180→                # Navigate to search page
   181→                page = browser.page
   182→                await retry_navigation(page, search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   183→
   184→                # Wait for page load
   185→                await async_random_delay('page_load')
   186→
   187→                # Check for captcha
   188→                await _check_captcha(page)
   189→
   190→                # Click "人脉" tab to show contact results
   191→                try:
   192→                    renmai_tab = await page.query_selector('text="人脉"')
   193→                    if renmai_tab:

   195→                        logger.info("Clicked '人脉' tab")
   196→                        await async_random_delay('action')
   197→                        # Wait for content to load
   198→                        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   199→                except Exception as e:
   200→                    logger.debug(f"Could not click 人脉 tab: {e}")
   201→
   202→                # Simulate human behavior

   204→                await async_random_delay('action')
   205→
   206→                # Extract candidates from this page
   207→                candidates = await _extract_search_results(page, config)
   208→
   209→                if not candidates:
   210→                    logger.info(f"No results found on page {page_num}")
   211→                    # Save screenshot for debugging
   212→                    await browser.screenshot(f"search_debug_page{page_num}")
   213→                    progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: No results")
   214→                    break
   215→
   216→                # Filter out non-R&D roles
   217→                before_rd_filter = len(candidates)
   218→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   219→                rd_filtered = before_rd_filter - len(candidates)
   220→                if rd_filtered > 0:
   221→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {rd_filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   222→
   223→                # Apply filters if specified
   224→                if company:
   225→                    company_lower = [cn.lower() for cn in company]
   226→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
   227→
   228→                if location:
   229→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.location and location.lower() in c.location.lower()]
   230→
   231→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   232→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   233→
   234→                # Log the action
   235→                rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   236→                    'keywords': keywords,
   237→                    'page': page_num,

   240→
   241→                # Save candidates to database

   243→
   244→                # Delay before next page

   248→            except Exception as e:

   250→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Error - {str(e)[:30]}")
   251→                # Take screenshot for debugging

   253→                continue
   254→
   255→    # Log search to history

   258→    console.print(f"[green]Search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")

## Pipeline Orchestration: "Search then Auto-Message" Flow

### 1. Pipeline Command Entry Point (`src/cli/main.py`, lines 247-540)

The `pipeline` command (lines 259-540) orchestrates the entire search and batch messaging workflow. It supports two modes:

#### **Default Mode** (`_pipeline_default`, lines 335-353)
```
Search all pages → Display candidates → Confirm → Send batch messages
```

#### **Batched Mode** (`_pipeline_batched`, lines 355-471) with `--batch-pages` flag
```
Loop: [Search N pages → Display → Confirm → Send batch] → Checkpoint → Resume
```

**Key entry point decision (lines 324-331):**
```python
if batch_pages > 0:
    await _pipeline_batched(...)  # Interleaved search & message
else:
    await _pipeline_default(...)   # Search all, then message all
```

---

### 2. Search Phase: `search_candidates()` Integration

**Function:** `src/modules/search.py:search_candidates()` (lines 114-259)

**Input Flow from CLI:**
- Keywords, company filters, location, max_pages
- Called via `_search_all_keywords()` wrapper (lines 23-63 in main.py)

**Key Steps:**
1. **Authentication** (line 151): `await ensure_logged_in(browser)`
2. **Pagination loop** (lines 162-253): For each page `start_page` to `start_page + pages`
3. **Rate limit check** (line 167): `await async_check_rate_limit('search')`
4. **Navigate to search URL** (lines 169-182): Build Maimai search URL with query params
5. **Captcha detection** (line 188): `await _check_captcha(page)` - pauses for manual resolution
6. **Extract candidates** (line 207): `await _extract_search_results(page, config)`
7. **Filter non-R&D roles** (lines 217-221): Removes sales, ops, HR, etc.
8. **Apply company/location filters** (lines 224-229)
9. **Save to database** (line 242): `_save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)`
10. **Log action** (lines 235-239): Track rate limit usage

**Returns:** `List[CandidateBasic]` objects with: `maimai_id`, `name`, `title`, `company`, `location`, `profile_url`

#### Extraction Details (`_extract_search_results`, lines 262-593):
- **Primary method** (lines 283-460): JavaScript-based avatar detection
  - Finds avatar images → locates parent card container
  - Parses text nodes to extract: name, company, title, industry
  - Uses regex patterns for job titles (lines 327-333)
  - Generates unique `maimai_id` from hash of `name|company|title` (lines 403-410)
  - Extracts profile URL and location
- **Fallback methods** if JS fails:
  - Strategy 1 (lines 475-546): Query profile links directly
  - Strategy 2 (lines 547-579): Find buttons ("好友", "关注") and extract parent info

---

### 3. Batch Message Send Phase: `send_message_batch()`

**Function:** `src/modules/message.py:send_message_batch()` (lines 314-529)

**Called from:** `_send_batch()` in main.py (lines 498-523)

**Input:**
```python
candidates=[
    {
        'maimai_id': '...',
        'name': '...',
        'company': '...',
        'title': '...',
        'profile_url': '...'
    },
    ...
]
template_name='greeting'
common_variables={'recruiter_name': '张三', ...}
skip_messaged=True
interactive=False
```

**Key Steps:**

1. **Load template** (lines 350-354): Get message template from config
2. **Create shared discovered_selectors** (lines 356-361): For interactive mode reuse across batch
3. **Filter already-messaged candidates** (lines 372-390):
   ```python
   # Check database for existing 'sent' messages
   with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
       existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
           candidate_maimai_id=c['maimai_id'],
           status='sent'
       ).first()
   ```
4. **Build preview for first candidate** (lines 396-399):
   - Render template with name/company/position substituted
5. **Display summary panel** (lines 404-425):
   - Shows template name, candidate count, message preview
6. **Single confirmation** (lines 428-434):
   ```python
   confirm = await loop.run_in_executor(
       None,
       lambda: questionary.confirm(
           f"Confirm batch send to {len(send_list)} candidates?"
       ).unsafe_ask()
   )
   ```
7. **Send one-by-one with progress bar** (lines 443-527):
   ```python
   with Progress(...) as progress:
       for c in send_list:
           # Rate limit check per candidate
           await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
           
           # Render template per candidate
           variables = {
               **common_variables,

           }

           # Send individual message

               maimai_id=c['maimai_id'],

               skip_confirmation=True,    # Batch already confirmed

               _skip_rate_check=True,      # We checked above
               profile_url=c.get('profile_url')
           )
           
           # Track result
           if success:
               results['sent'] += 1
           else:
               results['failed'] += 1
           
           # Human-like delay
           await async_random_delay('message')
   ```
8. **Return results** (line 529):
   ```python
   {
       'total': len(candidates),
       'sent': X,
       'failed': Y,
       'skipped': Z,
       'rate_limited': W,
       'details': [{'maimai_id': '...', 'status': '...', ...}, ...]
   }
   ```

---

### 4. Individual Message Send: `send_message()`

**Function:** `src/modules/message.py:send_message()` (lines 74-311)

**Called per-candidate from batch (line 477)**

**Key Steps:**

1. **Validate inputs** (lines 104-121)
2. **Render message** (line 124): `content = render_template(template['content'], variables)`
3. **Get candidate info** (line 127): Query DB for display
4. **Interactive confirmation** (lines 130-153) — SKIPPED in batch (skip_confirmation=True)
   - Preview message
   - Choice: Send / Edit / Skip
5. **Rate limit check** (lines 156-157): `await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')` — SKIPPED in batch (_skip_rate_check=True)
6. **Ensure logged in** (line 160)
7. **Navigate to chat** (lines 163-251):
   - Try discovered selectors if populated (lines 166-183)
   - Extract user_id from profile_url (line 186): `_extract_user_id(profile_url)`
   - Direct chat navigation if user_id found (lines 190-195): `MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=user_id)`
   - Fallback: Navigate to profile, click chat button (lines 196-245)
   - Interactive selector discovery if button not found (lines 217-238)
8. **Check existing conversation** (lines 254-258):
   - JS-based detection of real messages vs. system prompts
   - Skips to avoid duplicate greetings
9. **Type message** (lines 261-266): Find input field, human-like typing
10. **Click send button** (lines 271-276): Find and click send button
11. **Verify message sent** (lines 279-291): Poll for message in conversation area
    - Strategy 1: Check if message content appears in conversation
    - Strategy 2: Check if input was cleared
    - Strategy 3: Look for sent/delivered indicator
12. **Log to database** (line 302): `_log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')`
13. **Return success** (line 305): `True` if sent and verified

**Important:** Message verification happens via JavaScript polling (lines 854-884):
```javascript
// Look for message in conversation container
// Or check if input field was cleared
// Or check for sent/delivered indicator
```

---

### 5. Batched Pipeline with Checkpointing (`_pipeline_batched`)

**When `--batch-pages 2` is used with `-p 10`:** Searches pages 1-2, sends, saves checkpoint, then pages 3-4, etc.

**Checkpoint Save** (lines 413-420, 453-460):
```python
checkpoint.save(
    keywords=keywords,
    template=template,
    variables=variables,
    company=company,
    location=location,
    max_pages=max_pages,
    batch_pages=batch_pages,
    skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
    interactive=interactive,
    completed_pages=batch_end,
    sent_ids=sent_ids,
    seen_ids=list(seen_ids),
    total_results=total_results
)
```

**Resume from checkpoint** (lines 284-302):
- Loads `seen_ids`, `sent_ids`, `completed_pages` from checkpoint
- Resumes from `start_from_page = checkpoint.completed_pages + 1`

---

### 6. Critical Functions & Line References

| Function | File | Lines | Purpose |
|----------|------|-------|---------|
| `pipeline` | main.py | 259-540 | CLI entry, orchestrates search → message flow |
| `_pipeline_default` | main.py | 335-353 | Search all pages, then batch send |
| `_pipeline_batched` | main.py | 355-471 | Loop: search N pages, send, checkpoint, repeat |
| `_search_all_keywords` | main.py | 23-63 | Wrapper: iterate keywords, deduplicate candidates |
| `search_candidates` | search.py | 114-259 | Core search: navigate, extract, filter, save candidates |
| `_extract_search_results` | search.py | 262-593 | JS-based extraction of avatars→cards→candidate data |
| `_save_candidates_to_db` | search.py | 596-641 | Save/update candidates in SQLite |
| `send_message_batch` | message.py | 314-529 | Batch send: filter, preview, confirm, send one-by-one |
| `send_message` | message.py | 74-311 | Individual send: navigate, type, verify |
| `_click_chat_button` | message.py | 687-741 | Find and click "发消息" button |
| `_type_message` | message.py | 744-792 | Find input field, human-like typing |
| `_click_send_button` | message.py | 795-820 | Find and click send button |
| `_verify_message_sent` | message.py | 823-937 | Poll to verify message in conversation |
| `_check_existing_conversation` | message.py | 940-1032 | JS-based check for existing messages |
| `_log_message` | message.py | 1048-1074 | Log to Message table |
| `render_template` | message.py | 532-546 | Substitute variables in template |

---

### Summary Flow Diagram

```
CLI: pipeline -k "前端工程师" -t greeting -p 2

↓ (if batch_pages > 0)

Loop per batch:
  ├─ _search_all_keywords(keywords, company, location, pages)
  │  └─ For each keyword:
  │     └─ search_candidates()
  │        ├─ ensure_logged_in(browser)
  │        ├─ For each page:
  │        │  ├─ async_check_rate_limit('search')
  │        │  ├─ navigate to search URL
  │        │  ├─ _check_captcha() [pause if detected]
  │        │  ├─ _extract_search_results() [JS-based extraction]
  │        │  ├─ Filter non-R&D, company, location
  │        │  └─ _save_candidates_to_db()
  │        └─ Return List[CandidateBasic]
  │
  ├─ _display_candidates_table()
  │
  ├─ (if not dry_run)
  │  └─ _send_batch()
  │     └─ send_message_batch(candidates, template, variables)
  │        ├─ Filter already-messaged (if skip_messaged=True)
  │        ├─ Preview first message
  │        ├─ Single confirmation via questionary
  │        ├─ For each candidate:
  │        │  ├─ async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
  │        │  ├─ Render template (name/company/position substitution)
  │        │  ├─ send_message(maimai_id, template_name, variables, skip_confirmation=True, _skip_rate_check=True)
  │        │  │  ├─ Navigate to chat (direct URL or profile+click button)
  │        │  │  ├─ _check_existing_conversation() [JS-based]
  │        │  │  ├─ _type_message()
  │        │  │  ├─ _click_send_button()
  │        │  │  ├─ _verify_message_sent() [JS polling]
  │        │  │  └─ _log_message(status='sent')
  │        │  └─ async_random_delay('message')
  │        └─ Return {'sent': X, 'failed': Y, 'skipped': Z, 'rate_limited': W, 'details': [...]}
  │
  ├─ _display_send_results()
  │
  └─ checkpoint.save() [if batched]

End loop → _display_send_results(totals)
```

This architecture enables semi-automated recruiting with full human oversight at the batch confirmation step, plus rate limiting and session recovery.
